Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Continued To Nov-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: May Tong for Daniel McCotter and Amy Eby (Executors).

The Court informed Ms. Tong that she needs to respond in writing to the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes with regard to the Eaton Vance (Mutual Fund Trust Strategic Income Fund; Series Income Fund; Advantaged Bond Short Term Funds) and the Wells Fargo Bank Advisors account shown on the Changes in Principal schedule. The accounting petition was continued to November 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Anne Bouliane. Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: May Tong for Daniel McCotter.

The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $10,000.00 is required.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Kendall.
